allow:
Bash(echo "=== Files to Overwrite \(should now have full code\) ===" && \\
ls -la frontend/app/audit/page.jsx \\
  frontend/app/notifications/page.jsx \\
  frontend/app/settings/page.jsx \\
  frontend/app/admin/users/page.jsx \\
  frontend/app/team/page.jsx \\
  frontend/app/recommendations/page.jsx && \\
echo "" && \\
echo "=== Files Created \(should exist\) ===" && \\
ls -la frontend/components/meeting/MeetingQAPanel.jsx \\
  frontend/components/meeting/SimilarMeetingsPanel.jsx \\
  frontend/components/meeting/MeetingRoom.jsx \\
  frontend/components/dashboard/SubordinateDashboard.jsx \\
  frontend/components/dashboard/SuperiorDashboard.jsx \\
  frontend/components/dashboard/AdminDashboard.jsx \\
  frontend/app/meetings/\\[id\\]/page.jsx \\
  frontend/app/meetings/\\[id\\]/room/page.jsx \\
  frontend/app/meetings/\\[id\\]/schedule-followup/page.jsx \\
  frontend/app/team/\\[userId\\]/page.jsx \\
  frontend/app/admin/prompts/page.jsx \\
  frontend/app/admin/system/page.jsx \\
  frontend/app/dashboard/admin/page.jsx 2>/dev/null || echo "Some files may not exist")
Bash(cd /Users/aryansoni/Hackathon/orgos/frontend && grep -r "from '@/components" --include="*.jsx" | grep -v node_modules | awk -F"'" '{print $2}' | sort | uniq)
